name: 往櫺 WONGLING
profession:
超心理學研究 ｜ Parapsychology Researcher
未明現象調查 ｜ Unexplained Phenomena Investigator
聲波系統工作 ｜ Sonic System Practitioner
intro:
嗨，我是往櫺 WONGLING，目前是一位超心理學研究者、未明現象調查員以及聲波系統工作者，我試圖透過不同宗教信仰與學派理論來探索意識與靈性，並且嘗試解構未明現象與超自然事件。

我始終認為，當我們能夠理解其中成因及原理時，便能消解未知迷霧，找到相互啟發的連結。


Hello, I am WONGLING, currently a parapsychology researcher, an unexplained phenomena investigator, and a Sonic System Practitioner. I seek to explore consciousness and spirituality through the lens of diverse religious beliefs and theoretical frameworks, attempting to deconstruct anomalous phenomena and supernatural occurrences.

I firmly believe that by understanding their underlying causes and mechanisms, we can clear the fog of the unknown and discover mutually inspiring connections.
focusAreas: 意識維度假說與異常感知 (Anomalous Cognition) 實證研究
瀕死體驗與離體狀態之「灰色領域」空間力學
量子隨機數生成器 (RNG) 與微觀心物交互作用 (Micro-PK)
框鼓聲音共振 (Frame Drum Resonance) 之生理調控與療癒效應
宗教學、民俗文化與靈異現象之跨學科理性解構
